name: PRANSHU ACHARYA
pitch: AI/ML engineer with 3+ years of experience shipping end-to-end GenAI systems — RAG pipelines, agentic tool-calling workflows, LLM evaluation and guardrails — for Fortune 500 clients and applied research. Currently building AI-powered automation at UMass Dartmouth.

stats.proof: years delivering ML, NLP and GenAI in production
MS Data Science GPA, UMass Dartmouth
retrieval relevance gain from semantic RAG indexing
of weekly manual work eliminated via ETL automation
API latency cut on a global retail platform

Infra & MLOps: AWS (S3, Lambda, ECS, Glue, Redshift, Athena)

education.degree: Master of Science in Data Science
Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science & Engineering

experience.description: End-to-end AI-powered automation, data pipelines, and business intelligence — improving operational efficiency, reducing manual effort, and enabling self-service analytics.
highlights: Architected LLM-powered automation workflows that transform unstructured model outputs into structured intents, enabling backend task execution through function calling and workflow orchestration.
Engineered scalable ETL pipelines integrating 10+ disparate internal and external sources, standardizing schemas and eliminating 15+ hours of manual processing per week.
Built 10+ interactive Power BI dashboards tracking student-to-employer conversion funnels, hiring trends, and operational KPIs for leadership decision-making.
Automated end-to-end reporting and data workflows using Python, SQL, and Power BI, reducing operational overhead and accelerating business insights.

experience.description: Owned end-to-end LLM evaluation frameworks benchmarking foundation models on privacy, safety, and performance. Built ICV-based model steering and real-time PII guardrails for secure LLM deployment.
highlights: Designed a comprehensive evaluation framework to benchmark Llama 3.1 8B, Mistral 7B, GPT-4o, and Gemini on privacy-preserving NLP tasks, analyzing trade-offs between PII leakage, semantic fidelity, and utility.
Implemented In-Context Vector (ICV) latent-state steering using paired and unpaired demonstrations to align LLMs toward privacy-safe, non-inferential responses while maintaining response quality.
Developed a modular guardrail framework integrating SpaCy NER, custom PII detection, and real-time redaction to mitigate sensitive information leakage during LLM inference.
Built automated benchmarking pipelines and custom evaluation metrics enabling reproducible experimentation and systematic model comparison across safety, privacy, and semantic performance.

experience.description: Owned end-to-end development of scalable Java/Spring Boot microservices, AWS cloud infrastructure, and CI/CD pipelines for a global retail platform.
highlights: Architected and enhanced Java/Spring Boot microservices and RESTful APIs, reducing API latency by 25% through performance optimization, service orchestration, and database tuning.
Managed AWS infrastructure using Auto Scaling, Elastic Load Balancing, and CloudWatch to achieve 99.9% uptime under fluctuating enterprise workloads.
Automated software delivery through Jenkins CI/CD pipelines, integrating unit testing, build validation, and deployment automation.
Built test automation frameworks with JUnit and Mockito, increasing code coverage to 85% and reducing production defects by 15%.

projects.title: Secure RAG QA System
projects.subtitle: LangChain / ChromaDB
projects.description: RAG pipeline with hierarchical chunking and semantic indexing (+40% retrieval relevance vs. keyword search), with an in-chain PII redaction guardrail for HIPAA/SOC2 compliance.

projects.title: Repo Diagram Generator
projects.subtitle: Streamlit / GPT
projects.description: Streamlit app using GPT with recursive AST parsing to extract code structure and autogenerate Mermaid.js Class, Sequence, ER, and Journey diagrams — an LLM tool-calling workflow over raw source.

projects.title: AI Podcast Engine
projects.subtitle: Go / Next.js / ElevenLabs
projects.description: Go/Next.js engine that scrapes social trends, summarizes via OpenAI, and synthesizes high-fidelity audio with the ElevenLabs API — an end-to-end multi-step generative pipeline. (YHack)

projects.title: Emotion & Genre CNN
projects.subtitle: PyTorch / Librosa
projects.description: Multi-output PyTorch CNN trained on the DEAM dataset predicting continuous valence/arousal (0.107 RMSE) while simultaneously classifying musical genre, plus an LSB audio steganography tool.

projects.title: Forensics Drive Scanner
projects.subtitle: FastAPI / Electron
projects.description: Desktop tool performing multi-threaded enumeration of NTFS drive headers to reconstruct file hierarchies and detect hidden partition data, with VirusTotal hash-matching for malware identification.

projects.title: Twitter Sentiment Analysis
projects.subtitle: NLTK / Feedforward NN
projects.description: Processed 10,000+ tweets using TF-IDF vectorization and NLTK tokenization; trained a Feedforward Neural Network to 92% classification accuracy.

projects.title: Premier League Stats
projects.subtitle: Scikit-learn / XGBoost
projects.description: Scikit-learn pipeline (Random Forest/XGBoost) analyzing historical match data — 85% accuracy in outcome prediction through feature engineering of player and team form metrics.

projects.title: Duplicate Question Detection
projects.subtitle: Flask / Word2Vec
projects.description: Flask web app using Word2Vec embeddings and XGBoost to identify semantically duplicate queries in community forums, reducing content redundancy.

publications.title: Offensive Language Identification System
publications.description: Benchmarked SVM (77%), LSTM (75%), and Multinomial Naive Bayes (71%) on the SemEval-2019 OffensEval dataset; built a Flask-based interface for real-time offensive content detection.
